```{r}

library(rvertnet)
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(tigris)
library(ggpubr)
library(here)

occ <-
  searchbyterm(
    scientificname = "Sceloporus occidentalis",
    stateprovince = "California",
    year = '>=2000',
    limit = 10000
  )

occ <- occ_search(stateProvince = "California", limit = 10000, year = '2023', scientificName = "Sceloporus occidentalis")

source("general_functions.R")
ca <- get_ca()
coords <- 
  st_as_sf(occ$data, coords = c("decimallongitude", "decimallatitude"), crs = 4326) %>%
  st_crop(ca)
ggplot(coords) +
  geom_sf()

seasonal <-
  occ$data %>%
  # Filter to southern california
  filter(decimalLatitude < 36) %>%
  group_by(month) %>%
  summarise(n = n()) %>%
  drop_na()

seasonal %>% filter(is.na(month))
occ$data %>% filter(is.na(dateidentified)) %>% select(startdayofyear)

ggplot(seasonal) +
  geom_point(aes(x = factor(month), y = n))
```
